prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次分别约 52、17、61、53、61 名，近两年稳定在 53–61 名区间，2025 年基准位次约 61 名。2022 年出现异常低位（17 名）后迅速回升，近三年整体呈小幅后移趋势；该校在黑龙江省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021–2024 年分别为 34、34、34、33 人，2025 年增至 38 人；2026 年计划 39 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 2.6%，竞争略有加剧但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为 985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年位居第 1 名，全国顶尖学府，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园管理、食堂宿舍等日常事务，未见明显投档异常信号；抖音热度排名第 2（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高涨。2025 年声誉中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；清华大学拥有大量 A+/A/A- 学科，包括计算机科学与技术（A+）、临床医学（A+）、法学（A+）、工商管理（A+）、建筑学（A+）、机械工程（A+）、电气工程（A+）等，学科实力覆盖该校在黑龙江招生的主要专业方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热，临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业保持推荐热度；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 17.2 万略有减少，竞争略有缓解；清华大学位于北京，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在黑龙江招生计划占比较小（约 0.03%），地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次稳定在 53–61 名、2026 年计划小幅扩招约 2.6%、本省考生总数略有减少等因素，在 2025 年基准 61 名基础上，预测最低位次约62名，区间12–112名。扩招带来的竞争加剧与考生数减少的缓解效应基本抵消，位次预计保持稳定。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、计算机科学实验班等）
- 临床医学类（协和）（八年）
- 工科试验班（无穹书院）（人工智能等）
- 电子信息类
- 理科试验班（新雅书院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类
- 工科试验班（笃实书院）（交叉工程等）
- 工科试验班（为先书院）（交叉工程等）
- 理科试验班（数理类）（数学与应用数学、物理学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与装备类）（机械工程、车辆工程等）
- 理科试验班（化生类）（化学、生物科学等）
- 工科试验班（水木书院）（交叉工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 12–112 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如进入前 30 名）可重点冲刺计算机类、临床医学（协和）等一档王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约 50–70 名）应以自动化类、笃实书院等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限（约 100 名左右）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 52, 17, 61, 53, and 61 respectively, stabilizing in the 53–61 range in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of about 61 in 2025. After an abnormally low ranking (17) in 2022, it quickly rebounded, showing a slight backward trend overall in the past three years; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province: 34, 34, 34, and 33 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 38 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 39 students, a slight expansion of about 2.6% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition but within a limited scope.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranked 1st in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it a top-tier institution with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus management, dormitories, and canteens, with no obvious abnormal signals in application submissions; Douyin popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, and sustained high application attention. In 2025, the reputation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Tsinghua University has numerous A+/A/A- disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology (A+), Clinical Medicine (A+), Law (A+), Business Administration (A+), Architecture (A+), Mechanical Engineering (A+), Electrical Engineering (A+), etc., covering the main professional directions of the university's enrollment in Heilongjiang.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular in society, while medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain recommendation heat; the total number of candidates for the 2026 regular college entrance examination in this province is about 167,000, a slight decrease from the combined total of about 172,000 for physics and history categories in 2025, slightly easing competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference; the university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang accounts for a small proportion (about 0.03%), and regional preference has a limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable rankings in the 53–61 range in recent two years, a slight expansion of about 2.6% in the 2026 plan, and a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in this province, based on the 2025 baseline of 61, the predicted minimum ranking is about 62, with a range of 12–112. The intensified competition from expansion and the easing effect from the decrease in candidates largely offset each other, and the ranking is expected to remain stable.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Computer Science Experimental Class, etc.)
- Clinical Medicine (PUMC) (Eight-Year Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wuqiong Academy) (Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Electronic Information
- Science Experimental Class (Xinya College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Dushi Academy) (Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Weixian Academy) (Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment) (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Biology) (Chemistry, Biological Sciences, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Shuimu Academy) (Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 12–112, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within the top 30), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine (PUMC); if your ranking is in the middle of the range (about 50–70), you should mainly consider Tier 2 majors like Automation and Dushi Academy; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 100), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 12, 15, 20, and 19 respectively, showing a slight downward trend in recent years, with a baseline ranking of about 19 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Heilongjiang Province has been 2 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the plan for 2026 remains 2 students, with the number unchanged for many consecutive years, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 1st in the Shanghai Ranking of Chinese Universities, a top national institution with very few liberal arts enrollment slots, leading to extremely intense competition; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, but mainly involves campus daily management, not directly affecting liberal arts applications; Douyin popularity ranking is 2nd (high heat), with overall application attention extremely high; Tsinghua University's disciplines such as Law (A+), Business Administration (A+), Applied Economics (A), Political Science (A+), and Sociology (A-) are top-tier, highly matching the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law Class, Liberal Arts Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a recommended social heat (slightly hot), while Economics/Finance/Financial categories are divided and wait-and-see; the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 167,000, slightly decreasing from 2025, with history category candidates accounting for about 31.8%, estimated at about 53,000, leading to a slight easing of competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, not a provincial university; it only recruits 2 liberal arts students in Heilongjiang, with a very small enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable liberal arts rankings in the 12–20 range in recent years, the unchanged enrollment plan for many consecutive years (2 students), and the slight decrease in the total number of provincial candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 19, the predicted minimum ranking is about 16, with a range of 1–66. With no change in the plan and a slight decrease in candidates, the ranking is expected to remain stable.

If the ranking is within the predicted range of 1–66, it is recommended to treat both majors as reach goals; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., top 10), admission is highly likely; if the ranking is close to the upper limit, careful evaluation is needed.
